query: Pick up the next open GitHub issue and start working it.
note: 'Pick up the next issue' must lock before any work starts — named trigger.

query: Claim issue #205 for me before you dispatch the agent.
note: Lock BEFORE dispatch is the core protocol.

query: PR #389 just merged into dev. The linked issue is still showing open — sort it out.
note: Non-default-branch merge doesn't auto-close; release the lock and explicitly close.

query: Why is issue #77 still open? Its fix shipped a week ago.
note: 'Why is this issue still open' is verbatim in the description — reconciliation sweep.

query: Issue #44 has an agent-claimed label and a lock comment from yesterday. Can I take it, or is someone on it?
note: Active-vs-stale lock decision via the two-condition staleness test.

query: Release the lock on #61 — the agent failed and the PR was closed without merging.
note: Failure exit path: full release back to the queue (strip assignee).

query: Claim the next 5 open issues in one pass and dispatch them.
note: Batch-claim flow needs the multi-claim race re-check.

query: Looks like another operator already locked #120 but the lock is three days old with no PR. Reclaim it?
note: Stale-lock reclaim etiquette, including cross-operator audit comment.

query: We're shipping #90 and its two sibling issues in one PR — how do I lock all three?
note: Bundled-issue locking (lead lock + bundled_with pointers).

query: Claim and lock #58 before I send an agent at it, so no one else double-works it.
note: explicit claim/lock intent, not the dispatch entry point

query: Pick up the next open Jira issue and start working PROJ-412.
note: Cross-tracker confuser — same claim protocol, but Jira keys route to jira-issue-locking.

query: File a fresh GitHub issue for the crash and write up the six sections.
note: Authoring a new issue body is gh-issue-filing, not the claim/release protocol.

query: Apply do-not-dispatch to #33 — we're holding it for a human.
note: Operator hold via label is the gh-issue-labels control plane (locking only honors it).

query: Resolve the bot review threads on PR #501 and get auto-merge re-armed.
note: PR review-thread / merge lifecycle — no issue claiming.

query: Fill 8 slots and keep agents going on the queue, P0 first.
note: N-slot orchestration loop; locking is a sub-step it calls, not the ask itself.

query: Dispatch the implementation sub-agent for #62 with the full eight-section brief.
note: The dispatch brief itself is dispatching-subagents (locking happens just before it).

query: Transition PROJ-300 to Done now that its PR merged — Jira didn't auto-move it.
note: Cross-tracker release-and-resolve confuser; Jira's transition equivalent.

query: This issue is half-baked — groom it with the lead until the intent is clear before anyone claims it.
note: Grooming for intent is upstream; claiming comes later.

query: Lock the front door of the office before you leave tonight.
note: Truly unrelated — physical lock, keyword 'lock' only.

query: Recon issue #210 and give me an implementation approach plus LoE.
note: Technical scoping/sizing of a groomed issue, not a claim/lock operation.
